TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang m'utu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Kansai go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 339 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 60% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 40% kyan ku 135 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 59%, Amis 0.3%, Paywan 0.3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na m'utu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na m'utu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na m'utu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na m'utu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na m'utu hya' ga q'yulang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč m Ēutu …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu kans~…ēai …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *.*%, pajwan *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *.*%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, ru kjokaj. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a q ĒjulaŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang m'utu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Kansai go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 124 buwan, 339 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 60% kyan ku 204 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 40% kyan ku 135 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 59%, Amis 0.3%, Paywan 0.3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.3%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na m'utu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na m'utu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na m'utu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na m'utu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na m'utu hya' ga q'yulang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč m Ēutu …£a nija mki s~…ēku s~…ēin ¶~ ®ik keŇč atu kans~…ēai …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, tajan **%, amis~…ē *.*%, pajwan *.*%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *.*%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, ru kjokaj. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na m Ēutu ńßja Ē …£a q ĒjulaŇč. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
